name: squarespace-pp-mcp
description: Squarespace Commerce API plus browser-backed account dashboard read tools as MCP tools.

commerce_authorization.title: COMMERCE_AUTHORIZATION
commerce_authorization.description: Squarespace Commerce API bearer token. Required for official Commerce API commands.

squarespace_account_cookie.title: SQUARESPACE_ACCOUNT_COOKIE
squarespace_account_cookie.description: Browser Cookie header for account.squarespace.com. Required only for account dashboard commands.

squarespace_account_cookie_file.title: SQUARESPACE_ACCOUNT_COOKIE_FILE
squarespace_account_cookie_file.description: Path to a file containing the browser Cookie header for account.squarespace.com. Alternative to SQUARESPACE_ACCOUNT_COOKIE.
